snippet.title: SCH - Loup Noir | A COLORS SHOW
snippet.description:
French rapper Julien Schwarzer aka @SCH shares a performance of cinematic new song "Loup Noir"

New COLORS Apparel out now: https://shop.colorsxstudios.com

Follow
вЦґ Stream: https://colors.lnk.to/allshowscxs

вАФ

вЦґ On Spotify: https://colors.lnk.to/Spotify
вЦґ On Apple Music: https://colors.lnk.to/applemusic
вЦґ On the Web: https://colorsxstudios.com

COLORSXSTUDIOS is a unique aesthetic music platform showcasing exceptional talent from around the globe. COLORS focuses on the most distinctive new artists and original sounds in an increasingly fragmented and saturated scene. All COLORS shows seek to provide clear, minimalistic stage that shines a spotlight on the artists, giving them the opportunity to present their music without distraction.

LOUP NOIR 
LYRICS

Les sourires et les faux semblants 
Et quelques gouttes ont suffit 
A lвАЩ√©lixir pour √™tre mortel 
Que des caisses noires dans le cort√®ge 
Des 3-pi√®ces et des longs impers qui cachent les guitares 
Des reufs  au mitard 
Les faits divers en hiver 
JвАЩai fait 100 000 avant le mis-per  

JвАЩmвАЩentra√Ѓne √† sourire devant la glace 
JвАЩmвАЩentra√Ѓne √† souffrir sans rem√®de 
Le petite maison est en ruine 
Quand la faim pense, 
le coeur est en gr√®ve 
La vie cвАЩest mener les bons choix 
LвАЩimage vient sans m√™me une esquisse 
Dans le dos les schlass traversent la redskins
La trahison des gens quвАЩon estime 
JвАЩai pas vu p√®re fermer les paupi√®res 
T√™te dans le guidon cвАЩ√©tait le frigo 
Une chienne de vie √† se lever aux aurores 
JвАЩaurai jamais su comment faire 
JвАЩaurai jamais su comment perdre 
Avec la haine de ceux quвАЩon enferme  

Et quand les yeux se ferment et que tout est noir 
Quand les mots se perdent 
Tu veux  tuer un homme 
Prend du Sky et des faux espoirs 
Et quand les m√іmes se perdent 
Dans les sinueux couloirs des enfers 
On sera de retour 2 minutes avant 
Que les revolvers leur jouent du tonnerre 
LвАЩorage est parti o√є est le soleil 
Mon deuil nвАЩest pas fait o√є est mon sommeil¬†

JвАЩparle de vraies choses quвАЩon vit ici 
De vrais flingues quвАЩon a tenu
DвАЩun vrai sang qui sвАЩest vers√©
De la seule femme qui mвАЩa berc√© 
De vrais potes quвАЩon a perdus 

Des pens√©es noires et des nuits blanches 
Des armes des enfants terribles 
Le b√©ton le bruit du ciment 
L√† o√є on veut pas finir int√©rim 
Des gens mвАЩont trahi jвАЩai la naus√©e 
JвАЩd√©pose un flingue et quelques roses 
Sur le verso dвАЩun livre us√© 
√Йnum√©rer ce que jвАЩy ai laiss√© 
Prendre un maximum pour papa 
Comme si jвАЩallais le faire rena√Ѓtre 
DвАЩentre les morts comme un Dieu grec 
Tous les bleus que jвАЩai autour du coeur 
Tous ces billets froiss√©s dans mon sac 
Trop jeune pour embrasser le plomb 
Mais trop jeune pour vivre tout √Іa 
Des borsalino dans la nuit 
Des portes flingues tournent dans la ville 
Du sang √† √©ponger dans la cuisine 
Des billets qui flottent dans la piscine 
Little Italy Corleone sous Michael 
Marie Curie dans la compteuse
L√† o√є le ventre est le prompteur 

La faim justifie la violence 
L√† o√є la violence est la r√©ponse 
L√† o√є la violence est le moteur 
L√† o√є la violence est le docteur 
Vivons cach√©s vivons gant√©s 
faisons le tour du monde entier 
Avant quвАЩune balle nous arr√™te 
J.V.L.I.V.S

snippet.title: 5 minutes from death : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
вАЬI knew that what IвАЩd been looking for, I hadnвАЩt found yet. But what I had been looking for was not in the form of a drug.вАЭ
Demi and her closest confidants give a firsthand account of the aftermath of the overdose as she wakes up in the hospital after being minutes away from death.

snippet.title: losing control : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
вАЬI crossed a line IвАЩd never crossed in addiction.вАЭ 

In part I of this fearless documentary series, Demi Lovato and her family and friends candidly open up for the first time about what led to her near-fatal overdose.

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
If you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741

Pre-order Demi LovatoвАЩs new album вАШDancing With The DevilвА¶ The Art Of Starting OverвАЩ https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

snippet.title: Plopsaland wacht nog even om samen te werken met CEMI
snippet.description:
De attractie van TikTok-sterren C√©line en Michiel in Plopsaland De Panne komt er toch niet meteen! Studio 100 was met verschillende influencers aan het praten om samen projecten in het pretpark uit te werken, zoals de zweefmolen van CEMI. Vorige week maakte Studio 100 bekend dat de ROX-Flyer verandert in de CEMI-Flyer. Maar dat vond niet iedereen een goed idee. Op het nieuws kwamen heel wat felle reacties. 

рЯСН Vind je onze video's leuk? Abonneer je dan op ons kanaal en laat een comment achter. Die lezen we met veel plezier!
рЯТї Surf naar https://www.ketnet.be/karrewiet voor nog meer leuke videoвАЩs en de volledige Karrewiet uitzendingen.
рЯУ± Of download de gratis Ketnet-app.
рЯУЈ Volg Karrewiet op Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/karrewietketnet.

snippet.title: We Moved Across The Country
snippet.description:
You can check out our new live streaming channel here! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCiiY0MsUgNihfAZ2ZgC19lg

Hello friends and welcome to another video! So, late last year we decided to take the plunge and move across the country for a fresh start in a new place. After doing some serious decluttering, we packed up our house, grabbed our cat, and hit the road (and vlogged our whole cross-country road trip in our minivan!) It's been a couple of months and we are finally set up enough to dive back into making videos, so here is our moving vlog! Hopefully you guys enjoy it, and thank you for being so patient with us while we figure all of this out. 

Also, sorry about any smudginess of the windshield! It was tough to keep clean on our drive, but I know sometimes it can look gross, so sorry about that! Lol

This video is NOT sponsored!!

You can check out my Instagram here! https://www.instagram.com/safiyany/вАЛ

MUSIC
Via AudioNetwork

snippet.title: Glitterbomb Trap Catches Phone Scammer (who gets arrested)
snippet.description:
I glitterbombed my way up the scammer chain of command.  Come join me in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agencyвАЩs website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

Go watch JimвАЩs video to see how he located the scammers and subscribe to his channel- 
https://youtu.be/Xvjjpzyiig4

Go sub to Perogi with Scammer Payback too- 
https://youtube.com/c/ScammerPayback

New music this time from the talented Laura Shigihara- https://open.spotify.com/track/1zOzvy6SeVJs2MEET7vyCW?si=f3fee98828fa4802

Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaвАЛ #FutureNostalgiaвАЛ #Grammys

snippet.title: Martien en Maxime BESPIONEREN ERICA op haar DATE! | Chateau Meiland
snippet.description:
Bekijk alle afleveringen op de website: httpsa://bit.ly/2EPg6rz

ABONNEER op SBS6 voor meer video's: http://bit.ly/2qiTx8c.  
BEKIJK OOK eens de playlist van Chateau Meiland: https://bit.ly/2Q8QKsV

VOLG SBS6 op social media! 
Facebook | http://bit.ly/2qngtRA 
Instagram | sbs6nl
TikTok | sbs6nl

OVER Chateau Meiland
Martien, Erica en Maxime hebben het Franse chateau-leven verplaatst naar het dorpje Hengelo in de Achterhoek. Maar de Nederlandse regelzucht gaat slecht samen met de chaos van de familie Meiland. Officieel mag in de boerderij met bijgebouwen slechts √©√©n huishouden ingeschreven staan. Dus het moderne living-together-apart idee met voor iedereen een eigen woning, past niet in het stijve bestemmingsplan. En daar had even niemand op gerekend. De laatste dozen zijn nog niet eens uitgepakt, de verf is nog niet droog en de nieuwe keuken voor Maxime wordt net geplaatst. Wat nu? Strijden tegen ambtenaren, hopen dat het vanzelf goed komt of van de nood een deugd maken?

snippet.title: Laurie: вАЬAlsof ze UIT ELKAAR GETROKKEN wordt in die machineвАЭ | Hooligirls: Gyrospace
snippet.description:
De Hooligirls zijn terug met een splinternieuwe look en een wel h√©le gewilde prijs. Enthousiast beginnen ze aan de eerste challenge van het nieuwe seizoen, maar de moed zakt ze al snel in de schoenen wanneer ze met een maag vol appelmoes op de meest onmogelijke manier een geheugenspelletje moeten spelenвА¶ 

Welke hooligirl weet haar kots en tranen door te slikken en wie gaat naar huis met de eerste winst van het seizoen? 

Marie Louise, Jane en Laurie dagen elkaar uit in Hooligirls en doen daarin ALLES wat jij nooit zou durven. Elke week strijden de dames in een nieuwe challenge. Wie gaat er met de winst vandoor?

snippet.title: Famke Louise, Boef en Lil Kleine steunen slachtoffer Bilal Wahib
snippet.description:
Bilal Wahib en zijn advocaat zouden donderdagavond aanschuiven in de talkshow Beau. Op het laatste momenten lieten zij weten toch niet te komen. Media-verslaggever Rob Goossens legt uit waarom de redactie van het programma volgens hem een pijnlijke fout heeft gemaakt. Abonneer je hier gratis: http://bit.ly/AbonneerTelegraaf

Meer van De Telegraaf? Volg ons op:
Website: https://www.telegraaf.nl/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/telegraaf/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/telegraaf.nl/

snippet.title: Joe Biden stumbles on steps of Air Force One
snippet.description:
The US president stumbled while boarding Air Force One on his way to visit to Atlanta, Georgia, to meet with Asian American community leaders. Biden tripped on the steps up to the plane, before recovering and carrying on unaided, turning to salute at the top. The 78-year-old fractured his right foot in November 2020 while playing with his dog Major

localized.description:
The US president stumbled while boarding Air Force One on his way to visit to Atlanta, Georgia, to meet with Asian American community leaders. Biden tripped on the steps up to the plane, before recovering and carrying on unaided, turning to salute at the top. The 78-year-old fractured his right foot in November 2020 while playing with his dog Major

snippet.title: Kosso & Dorentina | Wintersessie 2021 | 101Barz
snippet.description:
Kosso & Dorentina kwamen vorig jaar als eerste koppel de 101Barz studio blessen en hadden de best bekeken sessie van 2020. Vandaag zijn ze weer bij Rotjoch in de booth om het nog eens dunnetjes over te doen. Lees verder op: https://www.bnnvara.nl/101barz/artikelen/kosso-dorentina-pakken-door

#KOSSO #DORENTINA #WINTERSESSIE #101BARZ

Mixed & Mastered by Rawbeem

101Barz is het grootste hiphop-platform van Nederland met wekelijks nieuwe video's. Natuurlijk brengt Rotjoch elke week de welbekende studiosessies op je beeldscherm, maar dat is niet alles. We gaan langs bij producers en zien hoe zij een beat maken voor de beginnende artiesten thuis in de serie 'BPM'. We zoeken talenten op in hun eigen buurt om ze beter te leren kennen in 'Talent vd Maand'. Ben je op zoek naar wat langere interviews? Dan is 'Ins & Outs' iets voor jou!

The official YouTube channel of Atlantic Records artist Bruno Mars. 11x GRAMMY Award winner and 27x GRAMMY Award nominee Bruno Mars is a celebrated singer, songwriter, producer, and musician with iconic hits like "The Lazy Song", "That's What I Like", "Just The Way You Are", "24K Magic", "Locked Out Of Heaven", and "When I Was Your Man". His legendary body of work also includes blockbuster albums such as Doo-Wops & Hooligans, Unorthodox Jukebox, and 24K Magic, as well as era-defining collaborations like "Uptown Funk" with Mark Ronson, "Finesse" with Cardi B, and "Nothin' On You" with B.o.B. Forever classic, yet supremely innovative, Bruno continues to redefine music, style, and popular culture, pushing the boundaries of pop, R&B, funk, soul, hip-hop, and dance, and remains as influential as ever.

snippet.title: Les 10 Essentiels dвАЩICO & Just Riadh (grillz, Mercedes et Pass Navigo ) | GQ
snippet.description:
ICO & Just Riadh ont pr√©sent√© √† GQ France les dix objets et accessoires dont ils ne se s√©parent jamais. Le r√©capвАЩ : un iPhone, des grillz, des AirPods Pro, un dipl√іme dвАЩ√©conomie de la Solvay Brussels School Economics & Management, des Freedent White, le meilleur pote dвАЩICO, un Pass Navigo, les cl√©s de la Mercedes dвАЩICO, un chargeur rapide Apple, et enfin, des lunettes de soleil. ICO est un rappeur venu tout droit de Belgique, de Bruxelles, pr√©cis√©ment. Il sвАЩest fait remarquer sur SoundCloud avec des morceaux remplis dвАЩhumour aux flows parfaitement ma√Ѓtris√©s. ICO, qui est aussi beatmaker √† ses heures perdues, est un acharn√© et est parvenu √† se forger une communaut√© autour de lui. Son premier disque, ¬Ђ¬†Petit con¬†¬ї, paru fin 2019, a dвАЩailleurs √©t√© tr√®s bien accueilli. Il est de retour en ce d√©but dвАЩann√©e 2021 avec deux extraits ¬Ђ¬†BBJTM¬†¬ї et ¬Ђ¬†Dis pardon¬†¬ї, le tout pour faire patienter son public pendant quвАЩil concocte son prochain projet. Just Riadh, quant √† lui, est un influenceur √† succ√®s. Ses contenus, bas√©s sur lвАЩhumour, lui permettent de d√©gotter des partenariats avec de multiples marques. Les deux acolytes se sont amus√©s √† collaborer sur un morceau : ¬Ђ¬†Rebeu fragile¬†¬ї et ont d√©voil√© leur deuxi√®me collaboration, ¬Ђ¬†Se√±orita¬†¬ї. Petit conseil GQ pour d√©couvrir ICO : √©coutez le morceau ¬Ђ¬†LвАЩalbum¬†¬ї.

snippet.title: BOEF - QUARANTAINE SESSIE #3 (PROD. KEYSER SOZE)
snippet.description:
Stream 'Quarantaine Sessie #3': https://boefmusic.lnk.to/QS3

CREDITS

Muziek
Uitvoering: Boef
Tekst: Sofiane Boussaadia
Muziek: Keyser Soze

Video
Regie: Teemong
Camera: Jim Stuurman & Teemong
Edit: Teemong

Lyrics
Alles voor de money, maar de fam die gaat first
Vlieg ik op vakantie, hele fam die gaat first
Weer een 100k, die ik beleg op de beurs
Toto dat is niks, had weer pech, fok de Spurs
Ik woon in een zieke huis, maar ik mis alleen een nurse
Ik moest stelen uit een purse, en nu pay jij voor een verse
Jij bent vervelend maar ik worse
Wordt gebeld вАШsta voor de deur, je spreekt met je chauffeurвАЩ
Ey, alles voor de kleur, want de kleur geeft me alles neef
Rappers krijgen pakkies, niet denken dat ik ze cadeaus geef
Wil jij geld maken, TMC, wordt een abonnee
Domme jongens die zeggen tegen die abo nee
En hij lacht mee, maar zou jou tot je graaf naaien
Jij ging niet op je doel, maar een afzwaaier
Pak je flappen, gaan ze plakken als een bladzijde
Ik lees de krant niet, weet niet wat ze in dat blad zeiden
Op der knie√Ђn, ze zegt A, maar is me Bae niet
Zij wilt praten over babyвАЩs, beter niet, ze maakt me C-ziek (zeeziek)
Praatjes maar je Deed niet, ik zweer het jij bent geen G
Geef geen F, Ha - Ha - Ha zet die puntjes op de I
En ze kennen RATATA, helemaal tot overseas
Elke album platina, is dit waar, geloof het niet
Dit is leip, maar verdien, want ik vocht broeder
Stuur geen brief naar je vriend, ga hem opzoeken
Today mislukt, dan moet je het laten lukken morgen
Ik ben een soldier, never ever heb ik teruggetrokken
Maar zou hij trekken, wollah teh had hem teruggetrokken
We runde hokken, en voor de rechter kunnen jokken
Niet geobserveerd en dan kun je gokken
Vraag niet naar der naam, vraag der kun je sokken?
Dit is leip, maar verdiend, want ik vocht broeder
Nu ga ik kwijt, terwijl de popo mij al zocht vroeger
Vele rappers zijn me kids, ik moet ze opvoeden
Zeg me moker level hoger, je moet opschroeven
Sla de spijker op ze kop, en wees op schroeven
Of op boeken maar, school was nooit echt mijn ding
Ik had neppe schoenen, wou een echt paar zonder scheiding
Ze begonnen me te boeken en dat voelde als bevrijding
Fok die zuen, duivel brengt me in verleiding
Ik moet even richting styling, want heb zometeen een clipshoot
Gezicht is al verbrand, ik kan dit echt niet meer voor niks doen
Ik kwam in de krant, brakkaвАЩs voelde als een plicht toen
BOEF in koeienletters, ga maar vragen aan een hindoe
Je chick wil stoeien met me, weet niet wat ik met die hint doe
Omringen met de juiste mensen, brada is wat ik doe
Ik kom van de bodem, ben nu paid, we kunnen sick doen
Haar een beetje korter, maar wat zal ik met me sik doen?
We braken deuren open, nu kun jij ze niet meer dichtdoen, Boef

BOEF
https://www.instagram.com/boef/вАЛ

snippet.title: Fast fashion - Les dessous de la mode √† bas prix | ARTE
snippet.description:
En quelques d√©cennies, la "fast fashion", ou mode jetable, a r√©volutionn√© lвАЩindustrie textile √† bas prix. Enqu√™te sur l'impact social et le co√їt environnemental d'un secteur qui ne conna√Ѓt pas la crise.

Renouveler en permanence sa garde-robe sans se ruiner : rien de plus simple aujourdвАЩhui. Tandis que les marques qui font le pari de vendre exclusivement en ligne se multiplient, lвАЩachat de v√™tements tient d√©sormais pour beaucoup dвАЩentre nous du loisir √† part enti√®re. Une tendance entretenue par les nouveaux acteurs de la fast fashion sur les r√©seaux sociaux qui, via un marketing subtil, r√©mun√®rent les influenceurs pour placer leurs produits. Ces derni√®res ann√©es, des marques dвАЩultra fast fashion se sont m√™me lanc√© le d√©fi de produire et de livrer encore plus vite et moins cher que les vendeurs traditionnels. Mais leur efficacit√© se paie au prix fort. En Grande-Bretagne, ces v√™tements sont fabriqu√©s dans des ateliers insalubres par des ouvriers pay√©s la moiti√© du salaire minimum. Au-del√† de son impact social, la fast fashion, deuxi√®me industrie la plus polluante au monde, a aussi un co√їt environnemental. M√™me quand ce mod√®le industriel promet de sвАЩamender en proposant une mode plus durable, sa facture √©cologique reste lourde.

Tragique constat
Alors que 56 millions de tonnes de v√™tements sont vendues chaque ann√©e dans le monde, les journalistes dвАЩinvestigation Gilles Bovon (Starbucks sans filtre) et √Йdouard Perrin ont enqu√™t√© sur lвАЩimpact social, environnemental et sanitaire de ce secteur en plein boom.¬†En Europe, aux √Йtats-Unis et en Inde, ils ont rencontr√© des acteurs du secteur ¬†вИТ anthropologue, professeur dвАЩ√©conomie, chercheur en neuromarketingвА¶ вИТ et se sont infiltr√©s au c≈Уur de lвАЩindustrie textile. Au Royaume-Uni, ils ont pu filmer des ateliers de fabrication ill√©gaux et interviewer des personnes qui ont c√іtoy√© de pr√®s la fast fashion (ex-styliste, influenceuse mode, ancien associ√© du fondateur de Zara...). Riche de t√©moignages, leur film dresse le bilan trop peu √©coresponsable dвАЩune industrie qui brasse des milliards.

Fast fashion - Les dessous de la mode √† bas prix
Documentaire d'Edouard Perrin et Gilles Bovon (France, 2020, 1h32mn)
Disponible jusqu'au 07/06/2021

snippet.title: LIVE: GRAMMY Awards Premiere Ceremony | March 14 at 3pm ET / 12pm PT
snippet.description:
MusicвАЩs Biggest Night kicks off with the Premiere Ceremony, featuring 8 special performances and more than 70 GRAMMYs awarded across music genres ranging from classical and jazz to R&B, Global music and more. 

Hosted by current three-time GRAMMY nominee Jhen√© Aiko, the Premiere Ceremony will feature a number of performances by current GRAMMY nominees, including: Nigerian singer, songwriter and rapper Burna Boy, jazz band Terri Lyne Carrington + Social Science, blues musician Jimmy "Duck" Holmes, classical pianist Igor Levit, Latin electropop musician Lido Pimienta, singer, songwriter and performance artist Poppy, and singer, songwriter and composer Rufus Wainwright. 

Kicking off the event will be a tribute performance celebrating the 50th anniversary of the classic Marvin Gaye track "Mercy, Mercy Me (The Ecology)". The special all-nominee ensemble performance will feature Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra, Thana Alexa, John Beasley, Camilo, Regina Carter, Alexandre Desplat, Bebel Gilberto, Lupita Infante, Sarah Jarosz, Mykal Kilgore, Ledisi, Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez, PJ Morton, Gregory Porter, Grace Potter, s√§je, Gustavo Santaolalla (Bajofondo), Anoushka Shankar, and Kamasi Washington. 

All of the Premiere Ceremony performers and the host are nominated this year, as are most of the presenters. Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra for Best Latin Jazz Album (Tradiciones); Aiko for Album Of The Year (Chilombo), Best R&B Performance ("Lightning & Thunder" featuring John Legend) and Best Progressive R&B Album (Chilombo); Alexa for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Ona); Beasley with Somi With Frankfurt Radio Big Band for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Holy Room: Live At Alte Oper), Best Large Jazz Ensemble Album (MONK'estra Plays John Beasley), Best Arrangement, Instrumental or A Cappella ("Donna Lee") and Best Arrangement, Instrumentals and Vocals ("Asas Fechadas" with Maria Mendes); Burna Boy for Best Global Music Album (Twice As Tall); Burr for Best Comedy Album (Paper Tiger); Camilo for Best Latin Pop or Urban Album (Por Primera Vez); Carrington + Social Science for Best Jazz Instrumental Album (Waiting Game); Carter for Best Improvised Jazz Solo ("Pachamama"); Chika for Best New Artist; Desplat for Best Instrumental Composition ("Plumfield"); Gilberto for Best Global Music Album (Agora); Holmes for Best Traditional Blues Album (Cypress Grove); Infante for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (La Serenata); Jarosz for Best American Roots Song ("Hometown"), Best Americana Album (World On The Ground); Kilgore for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Let Me Go"); Ledisi for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Anything For You"); Levit for Best Classical Instrumental Solo (Beethoven: Complete Piano Sonatas); Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (Bailando Sones Y Huapangos Con Mariachi Sol De Mexico De Jose Hernandez); Morton for Best Gospel Album (Gospel According To PJ); Pimienta for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Miss Colombia); Poppy for Best Metal Performance ("BLOODMONEY"); Porter for Best R&B Album (All Rise); Potter for Best Rock Performance ("Daylight"), Best Rock Album (Daylight); s√§je for Best Arrangement, Instruments and Vocals ("Desert Song"); Santaolalla with Bajofondo for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Aura); Shankar for Best Global Music Album (Love Letters); Wainwright for Best Traditional Pop Vocal Album (Unfollow The Rules); and Washington for Best Score Soundtrack For Visual Media (Becoming).

snippet.title: De kapel van Klooster Het Hoompje | De Drop #2
snippet.description:
Wie van ons moet in zijn eentje de hele nacht in de kapel van Klooster 'Het Hoompje' verblijven? Paranormale onderzoekers hebben aangegeven hier liever niet terug te keren.

Giel, Thomas of Stefan moeten ALLEEN de hele nacht op de engste plekken van Nederland verblijven. Wie het wordt, bepaalt het lot!
#stuktv #dedrop

DISCLAIMER
Tijdens de opnames van deze aflevering was de avondklok nog niet ingevoerd. Giel, Thomas, Stefan en de crew zijn voor aanvang van de opnames negatief getest op Corona.

"ЎµЎ®ўСЎІЎ±Ў©" ўЗўИ ўГўДўКЎ® ўКЎµЎѓЎ±ўЗ ЎІўДўБўЖЎІўЖ ЎѓўСўИЎ≤ўК ЎІЎ≠Ў™ўБЎІўДЎІўЛ Ў®ЎІўДўКўИўЕ ЎІўДЎєЎІўДўЕўК ўДўДўЕЎ±Ў£Ў©ЎЫ ўИЎІЎєЎ™Ў±ЎІўБЎІ ўДўЕЎІ Ў™ўВЎѓўЕўЗ ўЗЎІЎ™ўЗ ЎІўДЎ£ЎЃўКЎ±Ў© ўЕўЖ Ў™ЎґЎ≠ўКЎІЎ™ ЎђЎ≥ўКўЕЎ© ЎЃўДЎІўД ЎђўЕўКЎє ўЕЎ±ЎІЎ≠ўД Ў≠ўКЎІЎ™ўЗЎІ. ЎІўДЎ£ЎЇўЖўКЎ© ЎІўДЎ™ўК ЎІЎЃЎ™ўКЎ±Ў™ ўДЎ™ўГўИўЖ ЎђўКўЖўКЎ±ўКўГ ЎІўДўЕЎ≥ўДЎ≥ўД ЎІўДўЕЎЇЎ±Ў®ўК (Ў£ўИўДЎІЎѓ ЎІўДўЕЎ±Ў≥ўЙ)ЎМ ўЗўК ўЕўЖ Ў™ўИўВўКЎє ЎІўДўЕЎІўКЎ≥Ў™Ў±ўИ ЎђўДЎІўД ЎІўДЎ≠ўЕЎѓЎІўИўК ЎєўДўЙ ўЕЎ≥Ў™ўИўЙ ЎІўДўГўДўЕЎ© ўИЎІўДўДЎ≠ўЖ ўИЎІўДЎ™ўИЎ≤ўКЎєЎМ ўИўЕўЖ Ў•ЎЃЎ±ЎІЎђ ЎІўДўЕЎ®ЎѓЎє ўЕЎ±ЎІЎѓ ЎІўДЎЃўИЎґўКЎМ ЎІўДўГўДўКЎ® ўКЎєЎ±ўБ ўЕЎіЎІЎ±ўГЎ© ўЖЎЃЎ®Ў© ўЕўЖ Ў£Ў®ЎЈЎІўД ЎІўДўЕЎ≥ўДЎ≥ўДЎМ ўЖЎ∞ўГЎ± ўЕўЖ Ў®ўКўЖўЗўЕ ЎєЎ≤ўКЎ≤ ЎѓЎІЎѓЎІЎ≥ЎМ ўЕЎІЎђЎѓўИўДўКўЖ ЎІўДЎ•ЎѓЎ±ўКЎ≥ўКЎМ Ў£ўЕўКўЖ ЎІўДўЖЎІЎђўКЎМ ўЖЎІЎµЎ± Ў£ўВЎ®ЎІЎ® ,ўГўДўКўДЎ© Ў®ўИўЖЎєўКўДЎІЎ™ ўИЎҐЎЃЎ±ўИўЖ.. ЎІўДЎђЎѓўКЎ± Ў®ЎІўДЎ∞ўГЎ± Ў£ўЖ ЎµЎ®ЎІЎ±Ў© Ў•ўДўЙ ЎђЎІўЖЎ® ўЕЎ≥ўДЎ≥ўД Ў£ўИўДЎІЎѓ ЎІўДўЕЎ±Ў≥ўЙЎМ ўКЎєЎІўДЎђЎІўЖ ўБўК ЎЈўКЎІЎ™ўЗўЕЎІ ЎІўДЎєЎѓўКЎѓ ўЕўЖ ЎІўДўЕЎіЎІўГўД ЎІўДЎІЎђЎ™ўЕЎІЎєўКЎ© ЎѓЎІЎЃўД ўВЎІўДЎ® ЎѓЎ±ЎІўЕўК ўЕЎ™ЎђЎѓЎѓ

ўДЎІ Ў™Ў≥ўКўДўК ЎѓўЕўИЎєўГ Ў±ЎҐўЗ ўГўДЎіўК Ў®ЎІўДўЕўГЎ™ЎІЎ®

** *** ****
ЎєЎІЎ±ўБўГ ЎµЎ®ЎІЎ±Ў© ўИ ўВЎІЎ≥ўКЎ™ўК ўДЎєЎ∞ЎІЎ®
ўДЎІ Ў™Ў≥ўКўДўК ЎѓўЕўИЎєўГ Ў±ЎҐўЗ ўГўДЎіўК Ў®ЎІўДўЕўГЎ™ЎІЎ®

ўИЎ®ўГЎІ ЎєўКўЖўКЎІ ўЕЎІ Ў±Ў≠ўЕўЖўК ЎґўЕЎ±ўЖўК Ў™ЎґўЕЎІЎ±

ўГўЖЎ™ўК Ў®ўКўЖ ўКЎѓўКЎІ ЎґўКЎєЎ™ўГ Ў®ўКўЖ ўДўКўДЎІ ўИўЖўЗЎІЎ±
ЎҐЎҐЎҐўЗ ўКЎІ ЎѓўЖўКЎІ ўЕЎІ Ў®ўВўЙ ўЕЎІўКЎєЎђЎ® ўЕЎІ Ў®ўВўЙ ўЕЎІўКЎєЎђЎ®
ўИ ЎҐ ЎҐ ЎҐЎҐўЗ ўКЎІ ЎѓўЖўКЎІ ЎєўДЎІЎі ЎІўЖЎІ ўИЎ≠ЎѓўК ўДўК ўЖЎ™ЎєЎ∞Ў®
Ў•ўДЎІ Ў£ўЖЎІ ЎЇўДЎЈ ўБўК Ў≠ўВўГ Ў≥ЎІўЕЎ≠ўК

"ЎµЎ®ўСЎІЎ±Ў©" ўЗўИ ўГўДўКЎ® ўКЎµЎѓЎ±ўЗ ЎІўДўБўЖЎІўЖ ЎѓўСўИЎ≤ўК ЎІЎ≠Ў™ўБЎІўДЎІўЛ Ў®ЎІўДўКўИўЕ ЎІўДЎєЎІўДўЕўК ўДўДўЕЎ±Ў£Ў©ЎЫ ўИЎІЎєЎ™Ў±ЎІўБЎІ ўДўЕЎІ Ў™ўВЎѓўЕўЗ ўЗЎІЎ™ўЗ ЎІўДЎ£ЎЃўКЎ±Ў© ўЕўЖ Ў™ЎґЎ≠ўКЎІЎ™ ЎђЎ≥ўКўЕЎ© ЎЃўДЎІўД ЎђўЕўКЎє ўЕЎ±ЎІЎ≠ўД Ў≠ўКЎІЎ™ўЗЎІ. ЎІўДЎ£ЎЇўЖўКЎ© ЎІўДЎ™ўК ЎІЎЃЎ™ўКЎ±Ў™ ўДЎ™ўГўИўЖ ЎђўКўЖўКЎ±ўКўГ ЎІўДўЕЎ≥ўДЎ≥ўД ЎІўДўЕЎЇЎ±Ў®ўК (Ў£ўИўДЎІЎѓ ЎІўДўЕЎ±Ў≥ўЙ)ЎМ ўЗўК ўЕўЖ Ў™ўИўВўКЎє ЎІўДўЕЎІўКЎ≥Ў™Ў±ўИ ЎђўДЎІўД ЎІўДЎ≠ўЕЎѓЎІўИўК ЎєўДўЙ ўЕЎ≥Ў™ўИўЙ ЎІўДўГўДўЕЎ© ўИЎІўДўДЎ≠ўЖ ўИЎІўДЎ™ўИЎ≤ўКЎєЎМ ўИўЕўЖ Ў•ЎЃЎ±ЎІЎђ ЎІўДўЕЎ®ЎѓЎє ўЕЎ±ЎІЎѓ ЎІўДЎЃўИЎґўКЎМ ЎІўДўГўДўКЎ® ўКЎєЎ±ўБ ўЕЎіЎІЎ±ўГЎ© ўЖЎЃЎ®Ў© ўЕўЖ Ў£Ў®ЎЈЎІўД ЎІўДўЕЎ≥ўДЎ≥ўДЎМ ўЖЎ∞ўГЎ± ўЕўЖ Ў®ўКўЖўЗўЕ ЎєЎ≤ўКЎ≤ ЎѓЎІЎѓЎІЎ≥ЎМ ўЕЎІЎђЎѓўИўДўКўЖ ЎІўДЎ•ЎѓЎ±ўКЎ≥ўКЎМ Ў£ўЕўКўЖ ЎІўДўЖЎІЎђўКЎМ ўЖЎІЎµЎ± Ў£ўВЎ®ЎІЎ® ,ўГўДўКўДЎ© Ў®ўИўЖЎєўКўДЎІЎ™ ўИЎҐЎЃЎ±ўИўЖ.. ЎІўДЎђЎѓўКЎ± Ў®ЎІўДЎ∞ўГЎ± Ў£ўЖ ЎµЎ®ЎІЎ±Ў© Ў•ўДўЙ ЎђЎІўЖЎ® ўЕЎ≥ўДЎ≥ўД Ў£ўИўДЎІЎѓ ЎІўДўЕЎ±Ў≥ўЙЎМ ўКЎєЎІўДЎђЎІўЖ ўБўК ЎЈўКЎІЎ™ўЗўЕЎІ ЎІўДЎєЎѓўКЎѓ ўЕўЖ ЎІўДўЕЎіЎІўГўД ЎІўДЎІЎђЎ™ўЕЎІЎєўКЎ© ЎѓЎІЎЃўД ўВЎІўДЎ® ЎѓЎ±ЎІўЕўК ўЕЎ™ЎђЎѓЎѓ

snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and HarryвАЩs Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial.

snippet.description:
Masumiyet 4. B√ґl√Љm Tek Par√Іa (17 Mart √Зar≈Яamba)

Masumiyet Her √Зar≈Яamba 20.00'de FOX'ta!

ƒ∞lkerвАЩin ≈Яok ziyareti, bazƒ± sorulara cevap olup, acƒ±masƒ±z yalanlarƒ±n sonunu getirirken yeni bir acƒ±masƒ±zlƒ±ƒЯƒ±n fitilini ate≈Яler. ElaвАЩnƒ±n yanƒ±nda BaharвАЩa yakalanan ƒ∞lker, savunmasƒ±nda reddettiƒЯi ili≈Яkiyi kabul etmek zorunda kalƒ±r. Fakat ƒ∞lkerвАЩin a√Іƒ±klamasƒ±, ElaвАЩnƒ±n gururunu bir kez daha kƒ±rar. O g√Љne dek sadece kƒ±zƒ± i√Іin adalet arayƒ±≈Яƒ±nda olan Bahar, madalyonun diƒЯer y√Љz√Љyle; IlgazlarвАЩƒ±n profesyonelce y√Љr√Љtt√ЉƒЯ√Љ algƒ± operasyonuyla kar≈Яƒ± kar≈Яƒ±ya kalƒ±r. Operasyonun, bir diƒЯer kurbanƒ± ise ƒ∞remвАЩdir. ƒ∞remвАЩle ilgili ortaya √Іƒ±kan ≈Яok delil, duru≈Яmanƒ±n bile seyrini deƒЯi≈Яtirirken Harun, Hale ve Bahar arasƒ±nda kartlar yeniden daƒЯƒ±tƒ±lƒ±r. Harun ve Bahar, kƒ±zlarƒ± i√Іin i≈ЯbirliƒЯi yapmak zorundadƒ±r. Oklarƒ±n ƒ∞remвАЩi g√ґstermesi, ƒ∞lker ve Ela arasƒ±ndaki dengeyi sarsar. Ela, kafasƒ±ndaki karƒ±≈Яƒ±klƒ±ktan kurtulmanƒ±n bir yolunu bulur ve ger√Іeklere doƒЯru kimsenin beklemediƒЯi b√Љy√Љk bir adƒ±m atar. √Ьzerindeki b√Љy√Љk baskƒ±yƒ± ve ƒ∞lkerвАЩin kendisinden uzakla≈Яmasƒ±nƒ± kaldƒ±ramayan ƒ∞remвАЩin attƒ±ƒЯƒ± adƒ±m ise ElaвАЩnƒ±nkinden √Іok daha b√Љy√Љk olur. Ger√ІeƒЯin yƒ±kƒ±cƒ± etkisi hayatlarƒ± bir kez daha deƒЯi≈Яtirecektir.

Evli ve iki √Іocuk annesi BaharвАЩƒ±n (Deniz √Зakƒ±r) hayatƒ±, 19 ya≈Яƒ±ndaki kƒ±zƒ±nƒ±n yanlƒ±≈Я bir adama a≈Яƒ±k olmasƒ±yla deƒЯi≈Яir. Kƒ±zƒ± ElaвАЩnƒ±n (ƒ∞layda Ali≈Яan) ilk a≈Яkƒ±, ya≈Яƒ±tƒ± bir √Љniversite √ґƒЯrencisi deƒЯil babasƒ±nƒ±n, ba≈Яkasƒ±yla evlenmek √Љzere olan 35 ya≈Яƒ±ndaki patronudur. Kƒ±zƒ±nƒ± bu yanlƒ±≈Я ili≈Яkiden kurtarmaya √Іalƒ±≈Яan Bahar, ne yapsa da olacaklarƒ±n √ґn√Љne ge√Іemez. Bahar ve ailesinin hayatƒ±, ElaвАЩnƒ±n 19. ya≈Я g√Љn√Љnde sonsuza kadar deƒЯi≈Яir.

OYUNCULAR: H√ЬLYA AV≈ЮAR, MEHMET ASLANTUƒЮ, DENƒ∞Z √ЗAKIR, ƒ∞LAYDA ALƒ∞≈ЮAN, SERKAY T√ЬT√ЬNC√Ь, DENƒ∞Z I≈ЮIN, SELEN U√ЗER, TOLGA G√ЬLE√З, NESLƒ∞HAN ARSLAN, ASENA TUƒЮAL, ERTUƒЮRUL POSTOƒЮLU, ALAY√ЗA √ЦZT√ЬRK Gƒ∞Dƒ∞≈ЮLƒ∞, Kƒ∞MYA G√ЦK√ЗE AYTA√З, Gƒ∞ZEM ERG√ЬN, ASENA KESKƒ∞NCƒ∞, OZAN KAYA OKTU, SEVGƒ∞ TEMEL, R√Ь√ЗHAN √ЗALI≈ЮKUR

ƒ∞lkerвАЩin ≈Яok ziyareti, bazƒ± sorulara cevap olup, acƒ±masƒ±z yalanlarƒ±n sonunu getirirken yeni bir acƒ±masƒ±zlƒ±ƒЯƒ±n fitilini ate≈Яler. ElaвАЩnƒ±n yanƒ±nda BaharвАЩa yakalanan ƒ∞lker, savunmasƒ±nda reddettiƒЯi ili≈Яkiyi kabul etmek zorunda kalƒ±r. Fakat ƒ∞lkerвАЩin a√Іƒ±klamasƒ±, ElaвАЩnƒ±n gururunu bir kez daha kƒ±rar. O g√Љne dek sadece kƒ±zƒ± i√Іin adalet arayƒ±≈Яƒ±nda olan Bahar, madalyonun diƒЯer y√Љz√Љyle; IlgazlarвАЩƒ±n profesyonelce y√Љr√Љtt√ЉƒЯ√Љ algƒ± operasyonuyla kar≈Яƒ± kar≈Яƒ±ya kalƒ±r. Operasyonun, bir diƒЯer kurbanƒ± ise ƒ∞remвАЩdir. ƒ∞remвАЩle ilgili ortaya √Іƒ±kan ≈Яok delil, duru≈Яmanƒ±n bile seyrini deƒЯi≈Яtirirken Harun, Hale ve Bahar arasƒ±nda kartlar yeniden daƒЯƒ±tƒ±lƒ±r. Harun ve Bahar, kƒ±zlarƒ± i√Іin i≈ЯbirliƒЯi yapmak zorundadƒ±r. Oklarƒ±n ƒ∞remвАЩi g√ґstermesi, ƒ∞lker ve Ela arasƒ±ndaki dengeyi sarsar. Ela, kafasƒ±ndaki karƒ±≈Яƒ±klƒ±ktan kurtulmanƒ±n bir yolunu bulur ve ger√Іeklere doƒЯru kimsenin beklemediƒЯi b√Љy√Љk bir adƒ±m atar. √Ьzerindeki b√Љy√Љk baskƒ±yƒ± ve ƒ∞lkerвАЩin kendisinden uzakla≈Яmasƒ±nƒ± kaldƒ±ramayan ƒ∞remвАЩin attƒ±ƒЯƒ± adƒ±m ise ElaвАЩnƒ±nkinden √Іok daha b√Љy√Љk olur. Ger√ІeƒЯin yƒ±kƒ±cƒ± etkisi hayatlarƒ± bir kez daha deƒЯi≈Яtirecektir.

Evli ve iki √Іocuk annesi BaharвАЩƒ±n (Deniz √Зakƒ±r) hayatƒ±, 19 ya≈Яƒ±ndaki kƒ±zƒ±nƒ±n yanlƒ±≈Я bir adama a≈Яƒ±k olmasƒ±yla deƒЯi≈Яir. Kƒ±zƒ± ElaвАЩnƒ±n (ƒ∞layda Ali≈Яan) ilk a≈Яkƒ±, ya≈Яƒ±tƒ± bir √Љniversite √ґƒЯrencisi deƒЯil babasƒ±nƒ±n, ba≈Яkasƒ±yla evlenmek √Љzere olan 35 ya≈Яƒ±ndaki patronudur. Kƒ±zƒ±nƒ± bu yanlƒ±≈Я ili≈Яkiden kurtarmaya √Іalƒ±≈Яan Bahar, ne yapsa da olacaklarƒ±n √ґn√Љne ge√Іemez. Bahar ve ailesinin hayatƒ±, ElaвАЩnƒ±n 19. ya≈Я g√Љn√Љnde sonsuza kadar deƒЯi≈Яir.

OYUNCULAR: H√ЬLYA AV≈ЮAR, MEHMET ASLANTUƒЮ, DENƒ∞Z √ЗAKIR, ƒ∞LAYDA ALƒ∞≈ЮAN, SERKAY T√ЬT√ЬNC√Ь, DENƒ∞Z I≈ЮIN, SELEN U√ЗER, TOLGA G√ЬLE√З, NESLƒ∞HAN ARSLAN, ASENA TUƒЮAL, ERTUƒЮRUL POSTOƒЮLU, ALAY√ЗA √ЦZT√ЬRK Gƒ∞Dƒ∞≈ЮLƒ∞, Kƒ∞MYA G√ЦK√ЗE AYTA√З, Gƒ∞ZEM ERG√ЬN, ASENA KESKƒ∞NCƒ∞, OZAN KAYA OKTU, SEVGƒ∞ TEMEL, R√Ь√ЗHAN √ЗALI≈ЮKUR

snippet.title: Tikkende tijdbom: de volgende mega-aardbeving
snippet.description:
Precies tien jaar geleden kreeg Japan een van de zwaarste aardbevingen ooit over zich heen, met een tsunami en een kernramp erbovenop. De vraag is: waar komt de volgende mega-aardbeving? Want dat die komt, dat is zeker. Leggen we je uit. 

Luister ook naar onze podcast, Lang verhaal kort, in je favoriete podcast-app! Ook op Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/3Ab6DGFJL7VE5ToIH4r6w1?si=DqrwE6L2TvOb99FF1D2d3A

Meer videoвАЩs? Abonneer je op ons kanaal en praat mee! https://bit.ly/2PJk8Xg

Volg NOS op 3 ook op Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nosop3

We bedanken hoogleraar seismologie Arwen Deuss van de Universiteit Utrecht voor haar deskundige feedback op het script. In deze video van de Universiteit van Nederland legt zij uit waarom de wetenschap nog niet zo ver is dat het kan voorspellen wanneer aardbevingen gebeuren: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=q-E5PoOE8Q0 

Muziek:
Noria - 'Seashore'
Rujay - 'Bad Dreams'
Rujay - 'On Ice'

---------------------------------------------------------------

вЧП VRAGEN/TIPS/IDEE√ЛN? We horen graag wat jij van het nieuws en onze uitleg vindt, laat je horen in de comments! Of mail ons: nosop3@nos.nl

en.title: The next megathrust earthquake, when?
en.description: Exactly ten years ago, Japan suffered one of the worst earthquakes ever, with a tsunami and a nuclear disaster on top. The question is, where will the next mega earthquake be? Because it will come, that's for sure.

snippet.title: Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, opens up about her family
snippet.description:
For the first time Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, publicly discusses her father Thomas Markle and her half-sister's forthcoming tell-all book in this previously unaired clip from her and Prince Harry's sit-down with Oprah Winfrey. Watch Oprah's full primetime special with Meghan and Prince Harry here: https://bit.ly/3t24kAK

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

snippet.title: Kasteel Hoensbroek | De Drop #3
snippet.description:

snippet.title: GRAMMYs 2021: Harry Styles Sings Watermelon Sugar in ELECTRIFYING Performance
snippet.description:
Harry Styles can take a bow after his first award win and debut performance at the 63rd annual GRAMMY Awards, which aired on CBS. The 27-year-old singer won Best Pop Solo Performance for his song 'Watermelon Sugar,' which he performed live earlier in the broadcast. Harry's first GRAMMY win was met with applause from his fellow nominees, including Billie Eilish and Taylor Swift, who dated Harry in 2012.

#GRAMMYs2021

Exclusives from #ETonline :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLQwITQ__CeH2Y_7g2xeiNDa0vQsROQQgv

snippet.title: An Afternoon with Prince Harry & James Corden
snippet.description:
Now that the Duke and Duchess of Sussex are settled into Southern California, James Corden thought it was time to show his friend Prince Harry the sights. From tea on an open top bus to visiting the "Fresh Prince of Bel Air" mansion, Prince Harry gets the tour he never dreamed of. Special thanks to Spartan for providing an incredible Spartan Race Obstacle Course to run. Learn more: spartan.com

Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
On Wednesday, March 3, Starship serial number (SN10) successfully completed SpaceXвАЩs third high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from our site in Cameron County, Texas.

Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 was powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee вАУ approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 performed a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype descended under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps were actuated by an onboard flight computer to control StarshipвАЩs attitude during flight and enabled a precise landing at the intended location. SN10вАЩs Raptor engines reignited as the vehicle performed the landing flip maneuver immediately before successfully touching down on the landing pad! 

As if the flight test was not exciting enough, SN10 experienced a rapid unscheduled disassembly shortly after landing. These test flights are all about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration interplanetary flights, and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.

As if the flight test was not exciting enough, SN10 experienced a rapid unscheduled disassembly shortly after landing. These test flights are all about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration interplanetary flights, and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.

en.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
en.description:
On Wednesday, March 3, Starship serial number (SN10) successfully completed SpaceXвАЩs third high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from our site in Cameron County, Texas.

Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 was powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee вАУ approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 performed a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype descended under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps were actuated by an onboard flight computer to control StarshipвАЩs attitude during flight and enabled a precise landing at the intended location. SN10вАЩs Raptor engines reignited as the vehicle performed the landing flip maneuver immediately before successfully touching down on the landing pad! 

As if the flight test was not exciting enough, SN10 experienced a rapid unscheduled disassembly shortly after landing. These test flights are all about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration interplanetary flights, and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.
